# XIAOTONG Desktop Pet assets

Chroni uses selected visual assets from XIAOTONG Desktop Pet / 蓝色小嗵 as the desktop companion appearance.

Original repository: https://github.com/gildingmazzonimo621-design/XIAOTONG-Desktop-pet

Original About information retained in Chroni:

- Original version: v1.0.1
- Author: WWW.没有COM
- WeChat: xy12981118
- Donation QR payload: `donate_qr.b64`

The original project is distributed under Apache License 2.0 with additional terms. Keep `LICENSE` and `ADDITIONAL_TERMS.md` with any source or binary distribution that includes these assets. The additional terms prohibit unauthorized commercial use and require a reachable About / attribution view.
